fragility_points: Exact live standings and remaining pairings were under-verified from official sources.
Secondary summaries may be directionally right while overstating certainty.
key_assumptions: The live standings are favorable to Sindarov but not yet so decisive that 95% is clearly warranted.
Official FIDE source-of-truth should dominate secondary summaries for an extreme-probability live market.
main_logical_chain: Start from an outside-view prior well below 50% for any one player in an elite 8-player double round robin.
Move up materially because Sindarov is world-class and appears to be in strong current form late in the event.
Stop well below market because the strongest justification for 95% would require direct official standings confirmation.
main_thesis: Sindarov is a legitimate favorite late in the event, but a 95% market price is too high without clean official standings evidence showing the tournament is nearly locked.
quote_anchors: The governing source of truth is explicit: FIDE winner declaration / official standings logic first.
source_quality_view: Good enough for a directional view but not good enough to fully endorse an extreme market price; authoritative source capture remained incomplete.
strongest_disconfirmers: Eight-player elite double round robins rarely justify 95% for one player absent near-decisive standings.
This run did not capture a clean authoritative FIDE standings/winner page.
strongest_supports: Sindarov is an elite entrant around 2745 and world No. 11/12, not a fringe candidate.
Contextual reporting suggests he is undefeated deep into the event, which justifies a large uplift from flat prior.
timing_relevance: Very high; this is a live tournament market near resolution, so small standings details can move probability sharply.
unresolved_ambiguities: Whether Sindarov's lead is already practically decisive under standings/tiebreak math.
How much of the current market price reflects verified official information versus inference.
what_would_change_view: An official FIDE standings or round report showing Sindarov has effectively clinched would move me substantially upward toward the market.
